components.name: Chart
components.description: Main chart component that renders data visualizations (line, bar, area, pie, scatter, treemap, etc.) with automatic resize handling. Accepts a declarative data configuration and manages layout, axes, tooltips, and legend rendering internally.

props.name: data
props.description: Declarative chart configuration containing series data, axes, legend, tooltip, title, split, colors, and chart options

props.name: lang
props.description: Language code for i18n localization of chart labels

props.name: onResize
props.description: Callback fired whenever the chart container is resized

props.name: onReady
props.description: Callback fired when the chart has finished its initial render

components.name: ChartTooltipContent
components.description: Memoized component for rendering chart tooltip content. Supports custom renderers, row renderers, value/header formatting, and totals display. Falls back to DefaultTooltipContent when no custom renderer is provided.

props.name: hovered
props.description: Array of hovered data chunks to display in the tooltip

props.name: pinned
props.description: Whether the tooltip is pinned (stays visible)

props.name: renderer
props.description: Custom render function to completely replace default tooltip content

props.name: rowRenderer
props.description: Custom render function for individual tooltip rows

props.name: valueFormat
props.description: Format function or pattern for tooltip values

props.name: headerFormat
props.description: Format function or pattern for the tooltip header

props.name: hoveredPlotLines
props.description: Array of hovered plot lines to display in the tooltip

props.name: hoveredPlotBands
props.description: Array of hovered plot bands to display in the tooltip

props.name: totals
props.description: Configuration for displaying totals row in the tooltip

props.name: xAxis
props.description: X axis configuration used for formatting tooltip header values

props.name: yAxis
props.description: Y axis configuration used for formatting tooltip values

functions.name: CustomShapeRenderer
functions.description: Namespace object providing built-in custom shape renderer factories for chart series. Currently includes pieCenterText for rendering centered text inside donut/pie chart inner radius areas.
functions.signature: const CustomShapeRenderer: { pieCenterText: (text: string, options?: { padding?: string | number; color?: string; minFontSize?: number }) => ((args: { series: { innerRadius: number } }) => Promise<SVGGElement | null | undefined>) | undefined }

functions.name: getFormattedValue
functions.description: Formats a value according to a ValueFormat or CustomFormat specification. Handles number formatting, date formatting (via dateTimeUtc), and custom formatter functions. Falls back to String(value) for unrecognized or missing format types.
functions.signature: function getFormattedValue(args: { value: string | number | undefined | null; format?: ValueFormat | CustomFormat }): string | undefined

parameters.name: args
parameters.type: { value: string | number | undefined | null; format?: ValueFormat | CustomFormat }
parameters.description: Object containing the value to format and an optional format descriptor (number, date, or custom)

functions.name: getDefaultTooltipHeaderFormat
functions.description: Derives the default tooltip header format function based on series types and axis configuration. Returns undefined for series types that do not use an axis-based header (pie, treemap, waterfall, sankey, radar, heatmap, funnel). For bar-y series uses the Y axis domain; otherwise uses the X axis domain to determine the closest points range and select an appropriate value format.
functions.signature: function getDefaultTooltipHeaderFormat(args: { seriesData: ChartSeries[]; yAxes?: ChartYAxis[]; xAxis?: ChartXAxis }): ((args: { value: string | number | undefined | null }) => string | undefined) | undefined

parameters.name: args
parameters.type: { seriesData: ChartSeries[]; yAxes?: ChartYAxis[]; xAxis?: ChartXAxis }
parameters.description: Object containing the chart series array and optional Y and X axis configurations

functions.return_type: ((args: { value: string | number | undefined | null }) => string | undefined) | undefined
